title: Distributed Task Queue
bullets: High-performance distributed task queue system built with Go and Redis.
Asynchronous task processing with priority queuing and automatic retry mechanisms.
Real-time monitoring dashboard for tracking task execution and system health.

title: Real-time Analytics Dashboard
bullets: Interactive analytics dashboard with live data visualization via WebSockets.
Custom metrics tracking, KPI monitoring, and real-time chart updates.
Responsive design with dark mode support.

title: Kubernetes Operator
bullets: Automated database backup management via custom Kubernetes operator.
Declarative backup scheduling with CRDs and multi-cloud storage support.
Disaster recovery automation with point-in-time restore capabilities.

title: API Gateway Service
bullets: High-performance API gateway with intelligent rate limiting and routing.
JWT-based authentication with role-based access control.
Utilizes Redis for distributed rate throttling and middleware transformations.

title: Microservices Platform
bullets: Event-driven architecture with service discovery and load balancing.
Distributed tracing via OpenTelemetry and circuit breaker patterns.

title: CI/CD Pipeline Tool
bullets: Automated workflow orchestration for builds and deployments.
Multi-environment configuration management and parallel framework testing.
Advanced deployment capabilities including blue-green strategies and rollbacks.
